name: image_load_side_load_dbgmodel
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\dbgmodel.dll" and (not (file.path like~ ("C:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*", "C:\\Windows\\WinSxS\\*"))) and (not (file.path:"C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\Microsoft.WinDbg_*" or (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Windows Kits\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Windows Kits\\*"))))
